div.p: Key Insight: Page is already pinned in memory. Physical address is pre-resolved. DMA engine writes directly to user buffer. No kernel copy, no page fault possible.

g.text: Length | Multiple of page size preferred
Lifetime| Must remain valid until unregistered
Access | Readable for READ, writable for WRITE
Memory | Cannot be swapped (mlock if needed)

text.tspan: // buf0, buf1, buf2 must be page-aligned!
// buf0, buf1, buf2 must be page-aligned!
